steps.title: Match the percentage
steps.content: The sentence asks for the release period whose games still have 14.22 percent availability. The table value, not the general trend, is the key evidence.

steps.title: Use the table row
steps.content: A and C do not appear in the table. D corresponds to 15.38 percent, not 14.22 percent. The row with 14.22 percent is 1995-1999. The answer is B.
